items.title: Family-Owned, Serving Sonoma County 45+ Years
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Authorized Generac Generator Service & Repair
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Most Generac Factory-Trained Techs In Sonoma
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: CA Electrician License #1026407, Fully Insured
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Upfront, Transparent Pricing
items.body: Clear, honest pricing up front — no surprises on the final bill.

sections.heading: Three generations of trusted Sonoma County electricians
body: The LoDolce family has provided residential and commercial electrical contracting to Sonoma County for more than 45 years. Owner Joe LoDolce followed in his father's footsteps, learned the trade from the ground up, and now leads the team with the same reliable standards customers have trusted for decades.

As an Authorized Generac service and repair dealer, LoDolce Electric has more Generac factory-trained, certified technicians than any other company in Sonoma, Napa, and Marin counties combined — so your standby generator is ready when the next PSPS or outage hits. From a single outlet to whole-house wiring, Joe's team treats every job like it's in their own home: clean work, honest guidance, and transparent pricing.
highlights: Authorized Generac generator service & repair dealer
Most Generac factory-trained techs in Sonoma, Napa & Marin combined

sections.heading: Full-service electrical for homes and businesses

items.title: Residential Electrical
items.description: Safe, clean electrical work for your home — lighting installation and upgrades, dedicated circuits, panel improvements and labeling, plus outlets, switches, and dimmers.

items.title: Commercial Electrical
items.description: Professional service for offices, retail, and facilities, including tenant improvements, lighting retrofits and controls, dedicated equipment circuits, and troubleshooting with minimal disruption.

items.title: Generator Services
items.description: Backup power you can count on. As an Authorized Generac dealer, LoDolce Electric handles standby generator installation planning, transfer switches, maintenance, and troubleshooting to keep your home or business running during outages.

items.title: New Construction
items.description: Complete rough-in to final electrical for new builds, additions, and remodels — service planning, lighting plans, and final trim support.

items.title: Electrical Repair
items.description: Troubleshooting and reliable fixes for breakers, outlets, switches, flickering lights, and general power problems.

items.title: Electrical Service & Upgrades
items.description: Scheduled visits for ceiling fans, GFCI/AFCI updates, circuit additions, and safety improvements that keep your electrical system current and code-compliant.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message LoDolce Electric and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: Great price. Family owned and professionally driven! Joe and his wife Cammie are running a customer service oriented business. They responded to my needs on schedule and fixed my service panel in one call
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

items.quote: Joe installed my stand-by generator 5 years ago, and has provided excellent support and maintenance since then. In this era of PSPS's, having a stand-by generator with reliable service is almost required.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

items.quote: Prompt, knowledgeable and easy to discuss the situation in lay-man terms. The job was done quickly and correctly. Great folks in the office and in the field.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Work with LoDolce Electric
sections.body: Find us at Santa Rosa, CA. Call (707) 494-1611 — we’re glad to help.
